category_sources: source_facts.description says X.Org color names database; official freedesktop repository listing describes xorg/app/rgb as the X colorname to RGB mapping database.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xorgrgb while the official upstream module is xorg/app/rgb; display name chosen to preserve X.Org context and upstream module name.
docs_sources: official X.Org documentation is the general documentation surface; official GitLab repository is the best module-specific documentation surface for rgb.
repo_sources: freedesktop cgit lists xorg/app/rgb as mirrored from https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/app/rgb; source archive is from xorg.freedesktop.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the color names database and executable showrgb; official freedesktop listing describes RGB color-name mapping.
